title: In Bulgaria, a New Government Challenges an Old Puppet Master
summary_full: Delyan Peevski was a focus of protests that led to elections in April. A new government now promises to challenge his hold on power.
summary_public: Delyan Peevski was a focus of protests that led to elections in April. A new government now promises to challenge his hold on power.

BG.label: positive
BG.evidence: new government now promises to challenge his hold on power
